channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bill Ackman tries again with plan for IPO of Pershing Square and a new fund
item.description: Hedge fund manager Bill Ackman is again trying to take his fund management company public alongside the launch of a new fund.

item.title: Saudi Aramco promises full production can be restored within days if Strait of Hormuz is reopened
item.description: Aramco’s CEO warns of “catastrophic consequences” for the oil market if the effective closure of the Straits Of Hormuz were to remain for an extended ...

item.title: Social Security is already the best antipoverty program we have — don’t make this radical change
item.description: Changing Social Security to a flat benefit for all would put both workers and the poor at risk.

item.title: Return to the 2022 stock-market playbook as Iran conflict drags on, say these strategists
item.description: Barclays says the chasm between winning and losing stocks in 2022 when Russia invaded Ukraine was huge. Here are their style picks.

item.title: Scientists behind COVID-19 vaccine will depart BioNTech
item.description: The company’s co-founders said they are leaving to start a new mRNA-based company.

item.title: TD Cowen downgrades Novo Nordisk on concerns over semaglutide patent loss, pipeline outlook
item.description: TD Cowen still sees shares of Novo Nordisk adding 6% from here.

item.title: This cybersecurity stock is positioned to capitalize on AI tailwinds, says Morgan Stanley
item.description: The bank upgraded the cybersecurity stock to overweight from equal weight.

item.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: The Dow bounced from a loss of almost 900 points to posting a nearly 240-point gain on Monday after Trump indicated an end may be in sight for the Ira...

item.title: Higher energy prices mean this stock's big dividend will get even larger. Investor Harrington is a buyer
item.description: This stock already pays a hefty 7.1% dividend that the company expects to grow by 3% to 5% this year.

item.title: Oil was last above $100 back in 2022. These were the best and worst stocks to own during that stretch
item.description: A handful of stocks put on a standout performance the last time oil prices surged over $100 a barrel.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
